title: Confirm screen (step 2) with hardened API client (M2-T001 D1-D5 carry-forwards)
objective: Deliver the Confirm screen per PRODUCT_FLOW step 2 on top of the hardened boundary: client enforces exact HTTP-status/state pairs with unexpected_response for mismatches (regression: HTTP 500 + state=no_match never renders as no_match); full runtime validation of a 200 profile against generated types before rendering; bounded input/error reflection; request cancellation and timeout; resolve M2-T001 carry-forwards D1 (FIELD_LABELS for every surfaced raw PLUTO key - reviewed mapping, no invented interpretations), D2 (responsive viewports + keyboard-operated toggle/retry journeys), D3 (visible coverage-status legend), D4 (missing-inputs shared-reason density), D5 (post-success invalid-submit must not unmount the rendered profile)
business_reason: Client-facing critical path (handoff queue item 3); PRD section 32.2 stage 2
inputs: M2-T003 outputs: generated TypeScript types from packages/contracts/schemas/v1/property_profile.schema.json (the ONLY type vocabulary the client may use), backend response validation, exact HTTP-status/state pair guarantees, recorded 500+state=no_match regression fixture, contract_version resolution

project-control/reports/M2-T001-G3-review.md defects table D1-D5 VERBATIM: D1 FIELD_LABELS missing ~20 surfaced keys (residfar, commfar, facilfar, affresfar, mnffar, zonedist1-4, overlay1-2, spdist1-3, ltdheight, mih_opt1-4, edesignum, appbbl, appdate, condono) - labels must be a reviewed mapping with provenance, never invented interpretations; D2 responsive viewports + keyboard-operated grouped-toggle/retry e2e journeys; D3 always-visible coverage-status legend (not hover-only); D4 missing-inputs shared boilerplate reason stated once, not repeated x24; D5 post-success invalid submit must not unmount the rendered profile

docs/PRODUCT_FLOW_AND_AI_BOUNDARIES.md Step 2 Confirm spec: compact property card (canonical address, BBL/BIN, lot area/geometry summary, existing building facts, zoning districts/overlays/special districts, landmark/flood/pending flags, data conflicts, only questions government data cannot answer) + UI rules (one next action, plain language first, never legal-certainty by color, no silent defaults)
docs/PREMIUM_PRODUCT_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md + docs/3D_VISUAL_ACCEPTANCE_STANDARD.md (pack design standards, per handoff queue item 3)
M2-T001 accepted Property screen in apps/web (extend, do not fork; M1-T005 G3 section 5 tolerance rules still apply)
outputs: Confirm screen implementing PRODUCT_FLOW step 2 on apps/web, reachable from the Property screen result, with the compact property card sections and confirm/override affordances honestly labeled for facts the API provides today (no pretend user-assumption persistence - flag persistence as depending on M2-T004/analysis-run work)

Hardened API client module: exact status/state pair enforcement, unexpected_response state for any mismatch, runtime validation of every 200 profile against the generated types before render, bounded input/error reflection (length-capped, escaped), AbortController cancellation + timeout

D1-D5 resolutions: complete FIELD_LABELS with review provenance note; responsive layouts + viewport/keyboard e2e; visible coverage legend; deduplicated missing-inputs reason; profile persists across a subsequent invalid submit
Extended CI web job coverage (additive only); Playwright journeys for all scenarios with traces for G3
allowed_paths: .github/workflows/ci.yml (ADDITIVE changes to the web job only)
forbidden_paths: packages/contracts/** (generated types are M2-T003 output; never hand-edit)
acceptance_scenarios: S1 primary: Property lookup 1000010010 -> Confirm screen renders the full property card with units, coverage labels from contract enums, visible coverage legend, conflicts section, per-fact provenance drill-down

S2 boundary/regression (BLOCKING, owner-directed): recorded fixture HTTP 500 + state=no_match renders unexpected_response with correlation id - NEVER the no_match screen; any undocumented status/state pair -> unexpected_response
S3 malformed 200: profile failing runtime validation (wrong type, missing required key) -> validation-failure state, nothing partially rendered from an invalid payload

S4 D5 regression: successful profile then invalid BBL submit -> previous profile stays rendered with inline error; cancellation: rapid resubmit aborts the stale request (no late-arrival overwrite); timeout -> recoverable state

S5 D1: every key surfaced by the missing-inputs/facts sections has a human label from the reviewed FIELD_LABELS mapping; no raw PLUTO column name reaches the user; labels traceable to an official data-dictionary reference in the report

S6 D2/D3/D4: viewports 360px/768px/1280px render without overflow; grouped-missing toggle and retry operated by keyboard in e2e; coverage legend visible without hover; shared missing-reason stated once with per-field exceptions still shown

S7 honesty: no invented interpretations or 'best'/'verified' wording beyond contract enums; questions section only shows what official data cannot answer; internal/dev banner + PRD 29 disclaimer retained

S8 regression + hygiene: all M2-T001 journeys still green; lint/typecheck clean; no secrets in bundle; all installs/builds/tests in CI (owner PC source-edits only); task branch -> PR -> checks green -> merge per protected-main workflow
risks: Depends on M2-T003 (generated types + backend guarantees); do not start the client hardening against handwritten types
CI-only heavy execution stands (no local npm/Playwright); PR-based protected-main workflow applies
visual-quality-reviewer first real dispatch: confirm it writes only under its own agent-memory (M0-T013 G3 carry-forward 4)

progress_log.message: All gates reviewed PASS on PR #21: G3 human-journey (blocking C1 zmcode relabel applied at cc24e5f and validated; CI re-proved), G4 visual-quality (Major D1 a11y announcement/focus -> defect task M2-T005), G5 security (L1/L2 LOW). Session-10 reconciliation: branch was 5 ahead / 10 behind main; gh pr update-branch merge 8dab6e0 tree-identical to conflict-free merge-tree dry-run ebd5baf; empty diff over reviewed apps/web content and the four verbatim reports (no delta re-review required); full 8-job CI green on combined tree; merged to main at 505cda4.
